title: pseudostellaria okamotoi f. longipedicellata
intro: Pseudostellaria okamotoi f. longipedicellata, also known as Chinese chrysanthemum or false starwort, is a plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae, native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Pseudostellaria okamotoi f. longipedicellata include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to promote health and well-being.
